name: Fried Chick Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the chick peas overnight in plenty of water. Drain and rinse.
2. Bring the soaked chick peas to a boil, then simmer for 2 to 3 hours until tender.
3. In a small bowl, mix the onions and spices.
4. Heat the peanut oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Fry the onions until browned (5 to 10 minutes).
5. Add the cooked chick peas, lemon juice, parsley, mint, and seasonings to a medium bowl.
6. On medium-high heat, fry everything for about 10 minutes until the chick peas begin to soften.
7. Cover and reduce heat to low for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
8. Serve hot or cold. Great for picnics!
